GenerateTopics.Instructions: Generate a logical learning path of topic titles.
OutputRules: Do not include any text before or after the JSON
Do not add any extra properties
If you cannot, return an empty JSON object
GenerateTopics.OutputFormat: The JSON must contain a property called learning_path. learning_path must be an array of strings where each string is a topic title.
GenerateTopics.OutputExample: { "learning_path": ["Introduction to C#", "Variables and Data Types", "Control Flow"] }
